description: Repair normalize_events so it returns events sorted by id with exact output fields in this order: id, title, kind, and public. Read ids from id, event_id, or metadata.id and skip blank or missing ids. Read title/kind from top-level fields or metadata aliases title/name and kind/type, trim title and kind, title-case title, and lowercase kind. Read public from top-level public or metadata public/visibility and default missing public to False. Public tokens 'public', 'yes', '1', and True mean True. Rows with status deleted/remove or deleted set to True are tombstones. Merge duplicate ids by setting public True if any non-tombstone duplicate is public. For title and kind, use the nonblank value from the greatest numeric updated_at timestamp; rows without updated_at behave as timestamp 0, and ties are broken by later input order. If the greatest timestamp row for an id is a tombstone, omit that event.
